reforms.description: Norway has established R&D co-operation networks for SMEs and initiated efforts to strengthen SME clusters and networks to enhance collaboration and competition with larger firms, thereby fostering innovation among small and medium-sized enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing collaboration and competition among SMEs is expected to lead to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiatives have been put into practice and are operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of networks and clusters represents a significant but not structural change in the innovation ecosystem for SMEs.
reforms.source_quote: Establish R&D co-operation networks for SMEs.
